verify.intro: Thank you for registering with FinGather – your ultimate portfolio tracker. We're excited to have you on board!
verify.action: To complete your registration, please confirm your email by clicking the link below:
verify.features: Once your email is confirmed, you'll have full access to all FinGather features, including managing your assets, tracking gain and returns, and generating detailed portfolio reports.
verify.support: If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to us.
verify.thanks: Thank you for trusting us with your investment journey,

passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset the password for your FinGather account.
passwordReset.action: To reset your password, click the link below. The link is valid for 24 hours.
passwordReset.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.

priceAlert.auto: This email was sent automatically. You can disable email notifications in your account settings.

goal.auto: This email was sent automatically. You can disable email notifications in your account settings.

portfolioSummary.auto: This email was sent automatically. You can disable email notifications in your account settings.
